title: Iran says it has re-closed the Strait of Hormuz; Switzerland talks postponed
summary: After an Israeli strike on Lebanon, Iran says it has again closed the strait and the US–Iran talks are postponed — the week-old memorandum under strain.

title: Burnham wins Makerfield; a Labour leadership contest opens
summary: The Manchester mayor took the seat with about 55% and is expected to press Starmer to stand aside.

title: Ukraine strikes Crimea-bridge approaches overnight; trackers still disagree
summary: Drones hit the Kerch and Kavkaz ports on 21 June; DeepState and ISW give opposite readings of who is gaining ground.

title: The ceasefire's weakest link: Israel and Lebanon
summary: An Israeli strike on Lebanon on Saturday became the flashpoint that pushed Iran to re-close the strait and stall the talks.

title: Congo Ebola: 896 cases, 232 deaths, a global emergency
summary: The WHO's highest alert is in force; the Bundibugyo strain still has no licensed vaccine.

title: AI labs step onto the world stage: G7 debut, Seoul office, new benchmark
summary: Altman, Amodei and Hassabis appeared together at the G7; Anthropic opened a Seoul office and its Fable 5 model topped a hard-maths benchmark.

title: CERN completes the doubly-charmed baryon family
summary: Physicists report the third and final member, a confirmation of the Standard Model.

title: A California fault is more stressed than in 1,000 years
summary: Researchers describe an 'earthquake gate' on a system overdue for a major rupture.

title: A hawkish Fed reset the week before the holiday lull
summary: Markets were shut Friday for Juneteenth; the story remains Warsh's pivot toward a 2026 hike.

title: US and Iran sign the deal: ceasefire locked in, Hormuz blockade lifted
summary: Presidents Trump and Pezeshkian signed a memorandum — at Versailles and in Tehran — to halt fighting on all fronts and reopen the strait.

title: Ukraine sets a Moscow refinery ablaze in record drone strike
summary: Fires nine miles from the Kremlin; 500+ flights disrupted; Zelensky says it is time the war ended.

title: Warsh's Fed turns hawkish — a 2026 hike now on the table
summary: Rates held at 3.50–3.75%, but the easing bias is gone; nine of eighteen officials see a hike.

title: SpaceX buys Cursor maker Anysphere for $60bn
summary: SpaceX stock rose 17% and vaulted above Amazon and Microsoft to the fourth most valuable US firm.

title: Hegseth announces 'NATO 3.0' and a review of US forces in Europe
summary: The defense chief calls allies shameful as a six-month posture review begins.

title: Burnham wins Makerfield, setting up a Starmer showdown
summary: The Manchester mayor's by-election win opens a Labour leadership fight; Starmer vows to stay.

title: Congo Ebola passes 830 cases as WHO warns of worst-ever risk
summary: Nearly 200 dead; the Bundibugyo strain still has no licensed vaccine.

title: Scientists map the planet's hidden fungal 'superhighway'
summary: Underground networks moving about four billion tonnes of CO2 into soils a year, mapped for the first time.

title: G7 courts the AI chiefs as enterprise adoption accelerates
summary: Altman, Amodei and Hassabis join a G7 governance lunch in France.

title: Stocks rebound after the Fed shock; oil steadies near $78
summary: Nasdaq +1.91%, Russell 2000 +2.12%; Brent around $79 as the blockade ends.

title: US and Iran reach initial deal to end war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz
summary: A memorandum of understanding extends the fragile ceasefire by 60 days and reopens the strait.

title: Russian barrage sets Kyiv's thousand-year-old Lavra ablaze
summary: At least 11 killed nationwide; 70 missiles and 611 drones launched overnight.

title: SpaceX completes the largest IPO in history
summary: $75bn raised; shares add another 20% on Monday, with market cap above $2tn.

title: Ebola accelerates in DR Congo: 782 cases, 181 deaths
summary: The Bundibugyo strain has no licensed vaccine; the WHO seeks $518m.

title: Europe reels from 'exceptionally early' heat as AMOC watch grows
summary: 40.3°C in Portugal in May; 2026–30 seen 1.3–1.9°C above pre-industrial levels.

title: China's JUNO detector delivers its first neutrino result
summary: A Nature cover; oscillation precision sharpened 1.6x in just 59 days of data.

title: AI spending reclassified as core infrastructure
summary: JPMorgan earmarks about $19.8bn; new frontier models from OpenAI, Google and Anthropic.

title: Swiss voters reject a 10-million population cap
summary: About 55% say no on 59% turnout, averting a clash with the EU.

title: Carolina Hurricanes win their second Stanley Cup
summary: A 3–0 Game 6 shutout in Las Vegas; the goaltender stops all 22 shots.

title: Wall Street hits records on peace and SpaceX
summary: The Dow closes at a record 51,671; Nasdaq +3.07%; Brent slides toward $84.
